prompt: The class does not compile. What is the bug?
choices: A class can only implement one interface method at a time
Doc implements Printable but does not override save(); a concrete class must implement all abstract interface methods
interface methods must be public and Doc's print() is missing a modifier
Printable must be declared abstract to allow partial implementation
explanation: A concrete (non-abstract) class that implements an interface must provide implementations for all abstract methods. Doc only implements print(), leaving save() unimplemented. Fix: either implement save() in Doc, or declare Doc abstract.
